# DeepAKAI — llms.txt
# https://deepakai.in

## About DeepAKAI
DeepAKAI (Deepak AI Solutions) is an Indian company that builds AI-powered
WhatsApp chatbots for small and medium businesses (SMBs) across India.
Founded by Deepak Maurya, based in South West Delhi, India.

## What We Do
- Build AI-powered WhatsApp chatbots using Meta's official WhatsApp Business API
- Automate 24/7 replies, appointment booking, FAQ answers, lead capture, and daily reports
- Serve clinics, coaching institutes, restaurants, salons & spas, real estate agencies,
  D2C brands, CA & legal firms, and gyms across India
- Bots go live within 48 hours of sign-up

## Pricing
- Essential Plan: ₹2,500/month
- Customized Plan: ₹5,000/month
- Both plans include a free 15-day trial, no credit card required
- Setup fee currently free (limited time)

## Compliance
Data handling is aligned with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act).
Full privacy policy: https://deepakai.in/privacy-policy.html

## Contact
Website: https://deepakai.in
WhatsApp: +91-9999517081
Email: deepak@deepakai.in
Location: South West Delhi, India
